steps.title: Use Sumner's role
steps.content: The sentence says Sumner helped found Howard University's psychology department, increasing opportunities for Black students to study psychology. The blank should describe active support for that opportunity.

steps.title: Choose active advocacy
steps.content: B suggests Sumner was merely an add-on to the opportunity. C would mean he benefited from the opportunity rather than helping create it. D would mean he hindered the opportunity, contradicting the sentence. The needed phrase means an advocate or champion of the cause. The answer is A.
